description: Owner / Founder of PvP Empire, Director of Endless Space Film, MultiCraft YouTuber, PvPer, and editor known for high quality edits. Currently ranked in the MTCTiers Top 10, Tier 2 across all kits, with a peak of HT2 in Dragonhide KB.

Owner of Glassbane and MVER, and the director of Endless Space. A retired MultiCraft PvPer (except in Emerald), currently LT1 in Emerald with a peak of #2 Emerald PvPer in his prime, and currently ranked as the #2 MultiCraft editor.
A MultiCraft PvPer and coder, Owner of MTCTiers, owner of Montresique, and co-owner of PvP Empire. Peaked at LT1 in Dragonhide KB and is currently LT1 in Novelty Axe.
A retired MultiCraft player and talented builder known for creating some of the best MultiCraft servers. Renowned for exceptional building skills and bringing ambitious server projects to life.
A growing MultiCraft content creator and a builder for PvP Empire. Known for contributing to the server's builds before retiring from the building team.
LastChance also known as Blade is a MultiCraft content creator known for his painting skills and talent for building. Recognized for creating custom MultiCraft item designs and impressive builds.
